Method‐provenance block
Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans orbital gap) = 8.9406687 eV
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` → B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density-fitted RI Coulomb, in PySCF.
Geometry provenance: fixed geometry taken from the user-supplied file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz (water, 3 atoms); no re-optimization – single-point calculation only (notation: DFT//user xyz).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent used).
Charge and multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software: chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (backend PySCF; version as in chemkit runtime).
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged (7 cycles); no warnings were reported by the engine (warnings array empty). Integrity checks all passed (integrity.status = "ok"; trustworthy = true).

Reproducibility
Command executed (from result JSON):
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmppwc48d_1/live.json
The skill streamed a live log to a .out file in the caller’s working directory during execution; this path is available from the run environment if needed. The summarized JSON output is stored at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmppwc48d_1/live.json.

Result
B3LYP/def2-TZVP (gas-phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1) gives a HOMO energy of –8.6037183 eV and a LUMO energy of +0.33695037 eV, yielding a HOMO–LUMO gap of 8.9406687 eV (headline value reported above).
